title: Adiyae Ivalaey Lyrics Romeo Juliet Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Romeo Juliet Adiyae Ivalaey Song Lyrics
Singer(s): Anthony Daasan
Lyrics: Karky
Music: D Imman

Adiyae Adiyae Ivalaey
yen vazhkka paalaakka
pirandhavaley

Adiyae Adiyae azhagae
enna venaanu
sollitu parandhavaley

ponnungala ellaam
kuththam solla maaten
nee mattum thaan mosam

nee illaama ponaa
aayiduven veenaa
vaadi enakkosam

arakki
unna unna unna marakka
sara sara sara sarakka
modha modha modha
oothi kudichaen.

kirukki
unna unna unna verukka
mudi mudiyala
adiye adi manasula
vembi vedichaen.

Adiyae Adiyae Ivalaey
yen vazhkka paalaakka
pirandhavaley

Adiyae Adiyae azhagae
enna venaanu
sollitu parandhavaley

thambulil
orupakkam illayina
yaarukkum udhavaadhudi

thread millil
kai vechi oda sonna
ennaala mudiyaadhudi

karlaa sulatti
unna naan veratti
un mandayila poda nenappen.

vizhiya urutti
ena nee miratta
kaalil vilundhu
thandaal eduppen.

midhichi ammaadi
nee ponaa
jim body thaangaadhu.

arakki
unna unna unna marakka
sara sara sara sarakka
modha modha modha
oothi kudichaen.

kirukki
unna unna unna verukka
mudi mudiyala
adiye adi manasula
vembi vedichaen.

Adiyae Adiyae Ivalaey
yen vazhkka paalaakka
pirandhavaley

Adiyae Adiyae azhagae
enna venaanu
sollitu parandhavaley

Neethane emmela
kadhalunu
yen pinnae suthi vandha

naanthaane unnoda
vazhkayinnu
ooorellaam kathi vandha.

purse-a paathuthaan
manasa thandhiyaa
kaasa paartha thaan
kadhal varumaa

usura mothamaa
uruvi poniye
en saabam unna
summaa vidumaa.

idhuku munnaala
hero naan
inimel un villain thaan.

Adiyae Adiyae Ivalaey
yen vazhkka paalaakka
pirandhavaley

Adiyae Adiyae azhagae
enna venaanu
sollitu parandhavaley
podu

arakki
unna unna unna marakka
sara sara sara sarakka
modha modha modha
oothi kudichaen.

kirukki
unna unna unna verukka
mudi mudiyala
adiye adi manasula
vembi vedichaen.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who are the lead actors in the movie Romeo Juliet?

The lead roles are played by Jayam Ravi and Hansika Motwani.

Who is the singer of the song Adiyae Ivalaey?

The song is sung by the talented Anthonydasan.

What is the theme of the song Adiyae Ivalaey?

The song explores themes of love and longing, expressing deep emotions through its melody and lyrics.

Who composed the music for the movie Romeo Juliet?

The music was composed by the renowned D. Imman.

When was the movie Romeo Juliet released?

The movie was released in the year 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Adiyae Ivalaey from the movie Romeo Juliet, released in 2015, features the lead pair Jayam Ravi and Hansika Motwani. This melodious track, sung by Anthonydasan with lyrics by Karky, beautifully conveys the emotions of love and longing. The music, composed by D. Imman, enhances the heartfelt expressions of the song. It resonates deeply with listeners, making it a memorable addition to Tamil cinema's musical legacy.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Adiyae Ivalaey from the movie Romeo Juliet is a captivating melody that beautifully encapsulates the essence of love and longing. Sung by the talented Anthonydasan with lyrics penned by Karky, this song resonates deeply with its heartfelt emotions. The musical composition by D. Imman adds a soulful touch, making it an unforgettable experience for listeners.
stanzaMeanings: Romeo Juliet Adiyae Ivalaey Song Lyrics Singer(s): Anthony Daasan Lyrics: Karky Music: D Imman
Oh my beloved, you are the one who was born to make my life beautiful.
Oh my beloved, tell me what you want, you are the one who has come into my life.
I won't say anything bad about all the girls, you are the only one who is wrong.
If you leave, I will be lost, please come back for me.
I have forgotten you, I have drunk and lost myself completely.
I can't help but think of you, my heart is troubled and restless.
Oh my beloved, you are the one who was born to make my life beautiful.
Oh my beloved, tell me what you want, you are the one who has come into my life.
If there is no one on one side of the betel leaf, it won't help anyone.
I can't finish what I started with my hands in the thread mill.
I will talk to you softly, I will think of you in my dreams.
If you roll your eyes, I will fall at your feet.
If you go away, my body won't be able to handle it.
I have forgotten you, I have drunk and lost myself completely.
I can't help but think of you, my heart is troubled and restless.
Oh my beloved, you are the one who was born to make my life beautiful.
Oh my beloved, tell me what you want, you are the one who has come into my life.
You are the one who came around after I loved you.
I am the one who has come into your life, everyone else is just a distraction.
When I see the purse, my heart feels like it has been given, will love come?
If I lose everything, will you let me go without any regrets?
Before this, I was the hero, now I am your villain.
Oh my beloved, you are the one who was born to make my life beautiful.
Oh my beloved, tell me what you want, you are the one who has come into my life.
Let it go.
I have forgotten you, I have drunk and lost myself completely.
I can't help but think of you, my heart is troubled and restless.
